title: Error
description:
An error object is associated with individual DPA failures in a given batch.
Please note: In the event of a SUCCESSFUL response, this error object may be sent as NULL.

status.description: HTTP status code associated with the Digital Payment Application (DPA) item error

reason.description: Reason for receiving an error for the Digital Payment Application (DPA) item.

message.description: Additional details on the Digital Payment Application (DPA) item error.

errordetail.description: List of errors associated with a failed Digital Payment Application (DPA) item action.
